blocks.name: Testimonial Wall
blocks.description: A native testimonial grid with editable reviews, star ratings, layout controls, and highlight toggles.
blocks.author: Codex

props.title: What Customers Say
props.intro: Social proof helps visitors trust you faster. Add a few real reviews to show the quality of your work.

testimonials.name: Jordan M.
testimonials.quote: Fast response, fair pricing, and clear communication from start to finish.

testimonials.name: Taylor R.
testimonials.quote: Professional, efficient, and respectful of our home. We would absolutely hire them again.

testimonials.name: Avery S.
testimonials.quote: One of the easiest contractor experiences we have had. Everything felt organized and trustworthy.
